economic_notes: First Nation is economically dependent on ISC funding under Treaties. Consolidated subsidiary: Sheila Childforever Memorial Economic Development Corporation. Investments in Ontario First Nations Limited Partnership (1.77% interest), Ontario First Nations Sovereign Wealth LP (0.77%), Thawikayhigan Limited Partnership (16.64%), 2665686 Ontario Inc. (16.67%). Water treatment plant under construction. COVID-19 pandemic noted as significant event.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED due to inability to verify inventory counts at beginning and end of year (fuel and gas inventory). No long-term debt or line of credit drawn. Significant deferred revenue of $2.91M mainly from ISC water treatment system project ($1.61M). Water treatment plant under construction ($1.64M in assets under construction). Total government transfers calculated as ISC $6,182,163 + Ontario MNDM $195,534 + MIRR $188,363 + Ministry of Long-Term Care (minimal, embedded in deferred) = approximately $6,566,060 from identified government sources plus $887,982 OFNLP (gaming revenue, treated as transfer) totalling $7,453,822. OSR calculated as total revenue $5,606,055 less total government transfers excluding deferred adjustments; note revenue lines include deferred revenue netting adjustments making OSR approximation difficult — Other revenue of $685,744 used as OSR proxy. No remuneration schedule included in document. One subsidiary consolidated: Sheila Childforever Memorial Economic Development Corporation.
